events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: flange bolt-hole rotation wrong (two-holing missed). This is a defect in spool erection & fit-up. Work is rough-complete, 70% complete until defects corrected. This is non-compliant with ASME B31.3 and iso drawings. Decision should be fail because non-compliant. Risk: medium (flange misalignment can cause leaks). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: 70. Value: 0 (no numeric reading asked). Confidence high. Findings and actions.
